beforeSubmitPrompt.command: if [ -z "$MC_TASK_ID" ] || [ -z "$MC_API_URL" ]; then printf '{"continue":true}\n'; exit 0; fi; cat | curl -sS -m 3 -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer $MC_API_TOKEN" -H "X-Mission-Control-Runtime: electron-local" -H "Content-Type: application/json" --data-binary @- "$MC_API_URL/api/hooks/cursor?taskId=$MC_TASK_ID&hookEvent=beforeSubmitPrompt" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; printf '{"continue":true}\n'

sessionStart.command: if [ -z "$MC_TASK_ID" ] || [ -z "$MC_API_URL" ]; then printf '{"continue":true}\n'; exit 0; fi; cat | curl -sS -m 3 -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer $MC_API_TOKEN" -H "X-Mission-Control-Runtime: electron-local" -H "Content-Type: application/json" --data-binary @- "$MC_API_URL/api/hooks/cursor?taskId=$MC_TASK_ID&hookEvent=sessionStart" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; printf '{"continue":true}\n'

stop.command: if [ -z "$MC_TASK_ID" ] || [ -z "$MC_API_URL" ]; then printf '{"continue":true}\n'; exit 0; fi; cat | curl -sS -m 3 -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer $MC_API_TOKEN" -H "X-Mission-Control-Runtime: electron-local" -H "Content-Type: application/json" --data-binary @- "$MC_API_URL/api/hooks/cursor?taskId=$MC_TASK_ID&hookEvent=stop" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; printf '{"continue":true}\n'

afterAgentResponse.command: if [ -z "$MC_TASK_ID" ] || [ -z "$MC_API_URL" ]; then printf '{"continue":true}\n'; exit 0; fi; cat | curl -sS -m 3 -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer $MC_API_TOKEN" -H "X-Mission-Control-Runtime: electron-local" -H "Content-Type: application/json" --data-binary @- "$MC_API_URL/api/hooks/cursor?taskId=$MC_TASK_ID&hookEvent=afterAgentResponse" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; printf '{"continue":true}\n'
